nl_query: Show the daily scanning velocity for each exam in December 2025: the number of scripts scanned per day, the change from the previous day, and the number of new bundles opened.
failed_sql: SELECT esc.exam_erp_id, esc.exam_date, COUNT(DISTINCT sh.script_id) AS scripts_scanned, (COUNT(DISTINCT sh.script_id) - COALESCE(LAG(COUNT(DISTINCT sh.script_id)) OVER (PARTITION BY esc.exam_erp_id ORDER BY esc.exam_date), 0)) AS change_from_previous_day, COUNT(CASE WHEN b.status = 'OPEN' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS new_bundles_opened FROM exam_schedule_cache esc JOIN bundle b ON b.exam_id = esc.id JOIN scan_history sh ON sh.script_id = b.id WHERE esc.exam_date BETWEEN '2025-12-01' AND '2025-12-31' GROUP BY esc.exam_erp_id, esc.exam_date ORDER BY esc.exam_date;
